name: singleprmode-one-task
description: Validates SinglePRMode emits exactly one engineering task (T1) that covers all enhancements. Counter-scenario: MultiPRMode decomposes into multiple tasks.

config.projectDescription: A simple console calculator app with add, subtract, multiply, divide

agentScripts.response:
## Engineering Plan

### T1: Full Calculator Implementation
Implement all four arithmetic operations (add, subtract, multiply, divide) in a single task covering enhancements #200-#203.

Complexity: High
Wave: W0
